executive_summary: Today's competitive landscape scores a VOLATILE 68/100 threat index, driven by Salesforce's surprise Einstein AI Suite launch which directly targets Acme's core mid-market CRM segment with native AI features at no additional cost. Immediate action is required from the Product team to accelerate the Q3 AI roadmap announcement before Salesforce's launch event next week captures the narrative.
top_threat: Salesforce — Einstein AI Suite launched at no extra cost to Enterprise tier
